summary: All 10 features tested and PASSED. Apple Sign-In removed, Google/Email/Guest login options working, GuestSessionTimer component implemented with 2hr countdown, warning overlay at 5min/1min/30sec thresholds, and Replay Tutorial button in Settings.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: LoginScreen.tsx - Apple Sign-In button fully removed, no data-testid='apple-signin-btn' present
VERIFIED: LoginScreen.tsx line 132 - '2 hours' note added below guest button
VERIFIED: GuestSessionTimer.tsx - Full timer component with 2hr countdown (GUEST_SESSION_DURATION = 7200 seconds)
VERIFIED: GuestSessionTimer.tsx line 72 - Timer badge shows when remaining <= 30 minutes
VERIFIED: GuestSessionTimer.tsx lines 79, 99, 134, 141, 154 - All data-testid attributes present
VERIFIED: App.tsx lines 574-588 - useCallback hooks for guest session handlers placed BEFORE early returns (fixes React hooks error)
VERIFIED: App.tsx lines 650-657 - GuestSessionTimer rendered conditionally for user.isAnonymous
VERIFIED: SettingsView.tsx line 586 - Replay Tutorial button has data-testid='replay-tutorial-btn'

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features verified via UI testing and code review. Guest login works, dashboard loads successfully. GuestSessionTimer uses sessionStorage (not localStorage) so timer resets per browser session. Timer badge only visible when <= 30 min remaining. Warning overlay triggers at 5min/1min/30sec thresholds. Known issue: Gemini API key reported as leaked (TTS falls back to native).

feature_1_apple_signin_removed.details: Apple Sign-In button (data-testid='apple-signin-btn') does NOT exist on login screen

feature_2_google_signin_visible.details: Google Sign-In button (data-testid='google-signin-btn') is visible on login screen

feature_3_email_signin_create_account.details: Email Sign-In (data-testid='email-signin-btn') and Create Account (data-testid='email-register-btn') buttons visible

feature_4_guest_button_with_2hr_note.details: Continue as Guest button visible with '2 hours' limit note below it

feature_5_guest_login_works.details: Clicking 'Continue as Guest' loads dashboard without errors

feature_6_guest_session_timer_exists.details: GuestSessionTimer component renders for anonymous users, sessionStorage 'guest_session_start' key created

feature_7_timer_badge_at_30min.details: Timer badge (data-testid='guest-timer-badge') correctly hidden for fresh 2hr session, shows at 30min mark

feature_8_warning_overlay_buttons.details: Warning overlay (data-testid='guest-session-warning') includes Create Account and Google Sign-In buttons - verified in code

feature_9_warning_dismiss_button.details: Dismiss button (data-testid='guest-warning-dismiss') present with remaining time text - verified in code

feature_10_replay_tutorial_btn.details: Replay Tutorial button (data-testid='replay-tutorial-btn') visible in Settings page

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked - TTS falls back to native. Non-blocking issue (known from previous iterations).

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live
